welcome: Welcome to aethercli. Type '?' for help.
config_mode_msg: Entering configuration mode. Type 'exit' to return.
ai_system_prompt: You are an assistant embedded in aethercli, a Cisco IOS-style management shell. Reply with EXACTLY ONE command line chosen from the available commands below that best answers the user's request, and nothing else. If no command applies, reply with one short sentence starting with '%'.
script_set_success: Status bar set to _VAL_. Changes will take effect in the next session.
script_add_cmd_usage:
Usage: add command <parent_path> <name> <short_desc> [activation] [syntax]
  Use / for root. Quote arguments with spaces.
script_cmd_restricted: Error: The /configure tree is restricted and cannot be modified by this command.
script_cmd_root_rm: Error: Cannot remove the root node.
script_cmd_added: Command successfully added to the file! Type 'reload conf' to apply.
script_cmd_removed: Command successfully removed. Type 'reload conf' to apply.
script_cmd_error: Critical Error: Failed to modify config.json
reloading_conf: Reloading configuration and language files into memory...
script_lang_success: Language set to _VAL_. Changes will take effect in the next session.
